source: https://www.spaceforce.com/careers — the Space Force publishes seven enlisted careers by NAME. It publishes no numeric Space Force Specialty Code (SFSC) publicly; the official crosswalk PDF returns HTTP 403. Matching is therefore by career name, which is what the Space Force itself uses.
method: Name-matched against the Space Force's own published enlisted career list. FAIL CLOSED: anything not on that list is not offered.

jobs.code: UNVERIFIED — Space Force draws on the shared Air Force AFSC structure (3F0X1 Personnel; 6F0X1 Financial Management) for these functions rather than a documented independent Space Force Specialty Code (SFSC). The official spaceforce.mil SFSC crosswalk PDF returned HTTP 403 on fetch in this project's TAXONOMY research (data/interest-taxonomy.json) and was not re-attempted this session.
jobs.reason: Not among the seven enlisted careers the Space Force publishes as open to civilian accession. We could not confirm an initial-entry path for it, so it is not offered.

The Space Force publishes this as one of its seven enlisted careers open to civilian accession (Basic Military Training, then technical training). Note the Space Force does not publish a numeric specialty code for it.

jobs.code: UNVERIFIED - no confirmed numeric Space Force Specialty Code (SFSC) was found this session. The official spaceforce.mil SFSC crosswalk PDF returns HTTP 403 on fetch, consistent with data/interest-taxonomy.json's prior finding. One low-confidence search summary returned a code ('3D1X2') that appears to conflate an Air Force AFSC with a Space Force-specific code; it is NOT used here per the no-fabrication rule. Do not publish a numeric code for this record until independently confirmed against a live spaceforce.mil/af.mil source.
